name: reachability-advisor-vscode
description: Runs Reachability Advisor and displays dependency vulnerability diagnostics.

commands.title: Reachability Advisor: Generate Source Evidence Plan

reachabilityAdvisor.sbom.description: CycloneDX SBOM path relative to the workspace root.

reachabilityAdvisor.vulns.description: Vulnerability intelligence JSON path relative to the workspace root.

reachabilityAdvisor.context.description: Context JSON path relative to the workspace root.

reachabilityAdvisor.policy.description: Runtime policy JSON path relative to the workspace root.

reachabilityAdvisor.sourceRootArtifact.description: Artifact name used for artifact=workspace source-root mapping.

reachabilityAdvisor.analysisProfile.description: Scan profile. Production expects external source evidence and rendered deployment evidence.

reachabilityAdvisor.profilePreset.description: User-facing profile preset. release-gate maps to analysisProfile=production and requires strong source evidence for critical findings.

reachabilityAdvisor.sourceEvidence.description: External source evidence paths. Supports Reachability Advisor JSON, Semgrep JSON, SARIF/CodeQL, and govulncheck JSONL.

reachabilityAdvisor.terraformPlan.description: terraform show -json plan path relative to the workspace root.

reachabilityAdvisor.terraformSource.description: Terraform source path for advisory scans when no plan is available.

reachabilityAdvisor.kubernetesManifest.description: Rendered Kubernetes YAML/JSON manifest paths or directories.

reachabilityAdvisor.artifactManifest.description: CI artifact identity manifest paths. Use this to pass built image digests, registry refs, Git SHA, and SBOM paths.

reachabilityAdvisor.baseline.description: Baseline artifact. When present, diagnostics are filtered to new or worsened findings.

reachabilityAdvisor.diagnosticMinimumTie.description: Minimum tier shown as VS Code diagnostics.
